title: Mainly Optimized - Fps modpack
description: Fps modpack that only includes essential fps mods
body:
![Mainly Optimized logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b621e93ee4a6cd60f7c3c69d34db7c05e14c49.png)🔧 Features

    Extreme performance optimizations using mods like Lithium, Sodium, and Many more

    Smooth gameplay with reduced stutter and faster world loading

    Tweaked settings for maximum responsiveness and stability

    Minimal bloat – only what's needed to enhance speed and performance

🎮 Perfect For

    Low-end and mid-range PCs

    Players who want high FPS and fast load times

    Those who love vanilla gameplay but want it to run better

No fluff. No distractions. Just speed, stability, and the smoothest Minecraft you've played.

  For Older versions ( 1.8.9 , 1.12.2 ) please manually add optifine as im not allowed to add it )

🧩 Mod List & What They Do

🔧 Core Performance Optimizers

    Sodium – A complete rewrite of the rendering engine for massive FPS improvements.

    Lithium – Optimizes game logic and physics to reduce CPU load.

    FerriteCore – Reduces memory usage by optimizing block and item models.

    Krypton – Optimizes the network stack for improved multiplayer performance.

    ModernFix – Drastically reduces memory usage and fixes memory leaks.

    C2ME – Improves chunk loading and multi-threading performance.

    Noisium – Optimizes noise generation, speeding up world gen.

    ImmediatelyFast – Speeds up frame rendering with low-level GPU tweaks.

    Ksyxis – Parallelizes world generation for even faster terrain loading.

    Bedrodium - Improves bedrock layers

🖼️ Visual & Entity Performance

    Cull Leaves – Hides unseen leaf blocks to boost FPS in forests.

    Entity Culling – Skips rendering entities not visible to the player.

    Enhanced Block Entities – Improves performance of chests, signs, and other block entities.

🧰 Debugging & Utility

    Debugify – Fixes dozens of vanilla bugs that impact performance.

    Crash Assistant – Helps diagnose crashes with detailed error info.

    ModMenu – Clean interface for managing installed mods.

    Zoomify – Adds a customizable zoom key (like OptiFine’s zoom).

Discord server soon..**
